content:
# Recommendations — next plan iter (post-iter-003)

## Headline
**No in-leg prover work remains (3rd consecutive no-prover iter).** GR-quot leg delivered + axiom-clean (iter-001); seed `Grassmannian.represents` sorry-free. All 26 open sorries are deferred-by-standing-directive or out-of-cone. The mechanical no-prover skip recurs every iter until the input changes (a USER_HINTS redirect, or the sibling finishing SNAP). This is correct behavior on a closed leg, not a stall — consider whether the loop should idle less frequently on this leg.

## Do NOT re-assign (blocked / deferred — plan agent must not dispatch)
- **SNAP** (`SectionGradedRing.lean`, 11 sorries) — shared with sibling `FBC-B_SNAP-chain`. Sibling NOT yet finished (still 9 sorries) and has diverged 844 lines from ours; import is NOT actionable. Reconcile at merge-back; do NOT prove independently (divergence risk). Un-defer only on an explicit USER_HINTS directive after the sibling lands.
- **χ-blocked** (`QuotScheme.lean`: `hilbertPolynomial`, `QuotFunctor`, dependent `Grassmannian` functor) — χ-semantic, needs higher cohomology this i=0 leg lacks. Fills from cohomology leg at merge. Never build an H⁰ `Φ_s` under the χ label.
- **Weak `Grassmannian.representable` skeleton** — out-of-cone tracked debt; goal seed does not need it.

## Structural debt (NOT blocking; defer to merge-back)
- Blueprint-doctor broken refs (`Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex` 2 phantom covers + 13 `\ref`; `Picard_GlueDescent.tex` 4; `Picard_QuotScheme.tex` 13; `Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` 7) — all extraction artifacts outside the 3-seed cone. NOT to be edited here (byte-identical-to-parent merge discipline). They resolve when the cone merges into the parent's full chapter set.
- 326 leandag-unmatched Lean decls — parent-inherited helpers; authoring blueprint entries here would diverge from parent. Defer to merge.

## Reusable patterns
- None new this iter (no prover). Established patterns remain in PROJECT_STATUS.md Knowledge Base.
